'''Huegu Eib''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] farmer who founded [[Gryseium Incorporated]]. Eib later sold to [[Rigis Corazon]] after finding that the policies of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] made it difficult for non-[[Human/Legends|Humans]] to run an honest business.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Mynock Conspiracy|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
